* Student Disability Services (SDS)
At Johns Hopkins University we are committed to ensuring people with
disabilities enjoy full participation in the university’s programs,
services, and benefits. JHU seeks to continuously increase accessibility
on its campuses and in its activities, and prohibits unlawful
discrimination on the basis of disability.
Student Disability Services (SDS) promotes accessible and equitable
student experiences by leading and collaborating with campus partners to
proactively remove barriers and raise awareness of best practices.  SDS
also coordinates accommodations and services for students with disabilities.
Requesting Accommodations
To begin the process of requesting accommodations, students should
complete the online SDS Application
and provide documentation that meets the
SDS Guidelines for Documentation
. For more information or to
request assistance with any step in the process, students can contact an
SDS advisor at their school within the SDS Hubs below.
